tooltip.title: Settings
tooltip.note: Model, languages, interface, speech, and connections.

language.interfaceHint: Applied immediately and saved only for this browser.
language.responseHint: The model will answer in this language. This setting is independent from the interface language.

appearance.description: Visual preferences apply immediately and are saved for this browser.
appearance.sceneBackgroundHint: Blurs the generated image for the current scene and uses it as the game background.

developer.description: When disabled, players get a clean view without token counters, tool calls, GM and character thoughts, world-memory operations, or the story debug panel. Enable it to see the internal workflow.
developer.label: Developer mode
developer.debugNote: Choose exactly what to show on the Debug view tab. The switches apply immediately.

debug.visibilityDescription: Fine-grained interface visibility. Changes apply in real time.
debug.toolsDescription: Count text tokens through the OpenAI API (requires a saved API key).

tokenCards.label: Token counters beside the composer
tokenCards.hint: The GM context and Run total cards beside the input field.

messageTokens.label: Tokens below messages
messageTokens.hint: Per-turn totals and model-call metrics in the transcript.

toolCalls.label: GM tool calls
toolCalls.hint: Tool-call cards and raw JSON. When disabled, players see only safe results.

gmThoughts.label: GM thoughts and retries
gmThoughts.hint: The GM reasoning stream and notes when a character reply is sent back for revision.

npcInternals.label: Character internals
npcInternals.hint: Hidden character thoughts and response grounding. Speech and actions always remain visible.

memoryOps.label: World memory (search and write)
memoryOps.hint: World-memory reads and writes, NPC card requests, and tool loading.

historyDebug.label: Story debug tab
historyDebug.hint: The story debug panel for editing scenes, NPCs, facts, and other state.

gm.title: Game master
gm.note: Decides what happens in the scene, which tools to call, and what to tell the player.

npc.title: Characters
npc.note: Plays an individual character: speech, actions, memory, and hidden motives.

compact.title: Compaction
compact.note: Compresses old history. High reasoning is usually unnecessary here.

general.description: These parameters apply to every model request.
general.imageProviderHint: The local model is loaded only while selected. Grok uses the saved SuperGrok sign-in.
general.toolHopSubtitle: How many internal tools the GM can call during one turn.
general.toolHopNote: Set a number to stop an excessively long chain of actions.
